description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a distinctive pattern of alternating black and white horizontal stripes across its top surface. The stripes are evenly spaced and run parallel to the longer edge, creating a visually striking, high-contrast appearance. The sides of the block are solid black, giving the object a bold, modern look. The top surface appears to be made of a polished or semi-polished stone, possibly marble or granite, with the white stripes showing subtle marbling. The block is thick and robust, suggesting it is designed to serve as a barrier or obstacle in an urban environment. There are no visible engravings, markings, or signs of significant weathering on the surfaces.
description: A thick, rectangular stone block with alternating black and white stripes on top and solid black sides, giving it a modern, high-contrast look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the horizontal black and white stripes running across the top surface, with the solid black front face visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vertical orientation of the stripes from this angle, with the solid black side face prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the striped top and solid black rear face.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the vertical stripes and the solid black side face.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a decorative barrier or seating element
attribute_installation_method: set in concrete or on a leveled foundation
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; surfaces appear clean and well-maintained.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned in a row with similar blocks
